booking.step1Title: When do you need a sitter?
booking.emergencyNote: We'll only use this in case of emergency
booking.chargeNote: You won't be charged until the sitter confirms
booking.agreeTerms: I agree to the service terms and cancellation policy
booking.agreeExcluded: I confirm the excluded services (no overnight, pool, vehicle, medication)

checkout.secureNote: Your payment is protected. You won't be charged until the sitter confirms your booking.
checkout.cancellationNote: Free cancellation up to 24 hours before the session. Cancellations within 24 hours may be subject to a fee.
checkout.agreeNote: By confirming, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy

review.tellOthers: Tell other families about your experience

review.verifyNote: Your review will be visible after verification
review.helpNote: Your feedback helps other families find great sitters.
review.alreadyReviewedNote: You have already submitted a review for this session.
